nasb.text: Then I set apart twelve of the leading priests, Sherebiah, Hashabiah, and with them ten of their brothers;

esv.text: Then I set apart twelve of the leading priests: Sherebiah, Hashabiah, and ten of their kinsmen with them.

cnv.text: “我從祭司首領中選派了十二人，以及示利比、哈沙比雅和與他們在一起的十位兄弟，

ccb.text: 我选出十二位祭司长：示利比、哈沙比雅和他们的十个弟兄。
